column1: # Custom pronunciation overrides (win over the NST lexicon). TAB-separated:

column1: #  rˈɔbɔt / rˈɔbɔtar is consistent across singular, plural, and the godis- compound.)
# Greeting compounds: NST stores the stiff citation form with a full hard "god"
# (ɡuːd). Natural speech reduces god -> go (ɡʊ, no d) before natt/morgon/dag/kväll.

column2: ɡ ʊ n ˈ a t
ɡ ʊ n ˈ a t ˌ s ɑ ː ɡ a
ɡ ʊ m ˈ ɔ r ɔ n
ɡ ʊ d ˈ ɑ ː
ɡ ʊ k v ˈ ɛ l

column1: # Roman-numeral contamination in the NST lexicon: these map to NUMBER words

column2: ˈ i ː v ˌ e ː
